title: Develop a regional pest management plan
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a regional pest management plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine goals of the plan

pcs.text: Define pest problem and determine scope of pest management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define pest problem and determine scope of pest management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define pest problem and determine scope of pest management plan.

pcs.text: Establish a steering committee where a need has been identified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish a steering committee where a need has been identified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish a steering committee where a need has been identified.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine consultation requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine consultation requirements.

pcs.text: Determine and document goals through consultation with stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and document goals through consultation with stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and document goals through consultation with stakeholders.

pcs.text: Assess and document pest management options for goals of management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and document pest management options for goals of management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and document pest management options for goals of management plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine goals of the plan

elements.title: Set specific objectives for the pest management plan

pcs.text: Define and document objectives to be achieved in consultation with stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define and document objectives to be achieved in consultation with stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define and document objectives to be achieved in consultation with stakeholders.

pcs.text: Define roles and responsibilities of stakeholders in delivering objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define roles and responsibilities of stakeholders in delivering objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define roles and responsibilities of stakeholders in delivering objectives.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Set specific objectives for the pest management plan

elements.title: Identify activities required to achieve specific objectives

pcs.text: Determine and document activities required to achieve objectives in consultation with stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and document activities required to achieve objectives in consultation with stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and document activities required to achieve objectives in consultation with stakeholders.

pcs.text: Prioritise activities and seek commitment from stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prioritise activities and seek commitment from stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prioritise activities and seek commitment from stakeholders.

pcs.text: Conduct risk management assessment for community, environment, workplace health and safety and production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct risk management assessment for community, environment, workplace health and safety and production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct risk management assessment for community, environment, workplace health and safety and production.

pcs.text: Confirm activities align with pest management plan, and environmental, sustainability and biosecurity policies and legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm activities align with pest management plan, and environmental, sustainability and biosecurity policies and legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm activities align with pest management plan, and environmental, sustainability and biosecurity policies and legislation.

pcs.text: Determine measurable performance metrics for objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine measurable performance metrics for objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine measurable performance metrics for objectives.

pcs.text: Determine monitoring, evaluation and reporting methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine monitoring, evaluation and reporting methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine monitoring, evaluation and reporting methods.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify activities required to achieve specific objectives

elements.title: Publish the plan

pcs.text: Verify that plan complies with biosecurity, legislative and national and state or territory strategic policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify that plan complies with biosecurity, legislative and national and state or territory strategic policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify that plan complies with biosecurity, legislative and national and state or territory strategic policies.

pcs.text: Submit draft plan to stakeholders for review and feedback
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Submit draft plan to stakeholders for review and feedback?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit draft plan to stakeholders for review and feedback.

pcs.text: Finalise plan from stakeholder feedback and seek endorsement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Finalise plan from stakeholder feedback and seek endorsement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Finalise plan from stakeholder feedback and seek endorsement.

pcs.text: Publish and distribute plan according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Publish and distribute plan according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Publish and distribute plan according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Publish the plan

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
